name: hms-hospital-management-system
description: Full-stack Hospital Management System with patient consultations

scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:admin
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend" "npm run start:admin"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../admin && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install

author: Ashish Singh Rawat
